name: Imprisoned Swordsman
description:
(Kaiden x Dragonborn)

A swordsman of mysterious origin that you rescue from a flooded and nearly abandoned prison. Despite his initial reluctance, he could prove himself a valuable ally.

Realized I was sitting on this one in my privates for a hot minute. Consider this a somewhat spiritual prequel to my other two Skyrim bots. Unlike those two this is before Alcuin and any non-canon events happen.

No recs, you’re the Dragonborn and he’s in need of rescuing. Help him out and try to save the world.
creator: Jinx0101
